deviceUuidHint: Leave default unless you want to mimic your own device id
legacyPollIntervalSecHint: Only used for legacy/Aliyun telemetry. Range: 10-300 seconds.
legacyTelemetryTransportHint: MQTT push is experimental; polling is currently recommended.
storeDebugPayloadsHint: Stores lastPayload and lastProtoContent. Enable only for analysis.
aliyunMqttUseTlsHint: Enable when outbound port 1883 is blocked on your network. Default off keeps the existing plain-TCP behaviour for backwards compatibility.
aliyunMqttTlsAllowInsecureHint: Effective only when TLS is enabled. Disables broker certificate verification (rejectUnauthorized=false). Use only if your Node.js installation cannot verify Aliyun's certificate chain (typical error: 'unable to get local issuer certificate'). The connection stays encrypted, but is no longer authenticated.
